title: Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam
tagline: Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Kalahastiswamy Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Uthamapalayam in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Kalahastiswamy Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Uthamapalayam in Tamil Nadu, India. Dedicated to the god Shiva, the temple is believed to have been constructed by three warring kings who came to a compromise. The temple has paintings dating to the Madurai Nayak period.

topPlaces.name: Uthamapalayam
topPlaces.description: Uthamapalayam is a town in Theni district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Uthamapalayam, a beautiful town in today's Theni district, has witnessed the influence of various rulers throughout history.

topPlaces.name: Uthamapalayam taluk
topPlaces.description: Uthamapalayam taluk is a taluk of Theni district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Uthamapalayam.

topPlaces.name: Uthamapalayam division
topPlaces.description: Uthamapalayam division is a revenue division in the Theni district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Anaimalayanpatty
topPlaces.description: Anaimalayanpatty is a village under Uthamapalayam Taluk, Theni District, Tamil Nadu, India. The population of village would be around 8,000.

topPlaces.name: Kombai, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Kombai is a panchayat town in Theni District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, in the foot hills of the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Hanumanthampatti
topPlaces.description: Hanumanthanpatti is a town panchayat located in Uthamapalayam taluk, Theni district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Chinnamanur
topPlaces.description: Chinnamanur is a town in Theni district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. As of 2011, the town had a population of 42,305.

topPlaces.name: Erasakkanayakkanur
topPlaces.description: Erasakkanayakkanur is a small village located near Theni, Tamil Nadu state, India. It has a population of about 3,600.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam?
faq.a: Stays in Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalahastiswamy Temple, Uthamapalayam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Uthamapalayam, Uthamapalayam taluk, Uthamapalayam division, Anaimalayanpatty, Kombai, Tamil Nadu.
